images.caption:
Figure 2:WER (top) — lower is better. Accuracy (bottom) — higher is better.
CLD shows robustness and competitive performance regardless of sample size,
while competing methods require more data to achieve comparable performance.

Figure 3:Language classification performance using Whisper-small across
English (en), Chinese (zh), Indonesian (id), Malaysian (ms), and Hindi (hi).
CLD (top) is compared against a vanilla neural network (bottom).
